zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan Reginald de Dunstanville於大約1105年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾卡素 可姆時，他的父親Reginald Robert de Dunstanville53歲，母親Adeliza Lisle48歲。他於大約1111年與Isabel FitzReginald在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1150年4月3日在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan Reginald de Dunstanville于大约1105年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾卡素 可姆时，他的父亲Reginald Robert de Dunstanville53岁，母亲Adeliza Lisle48岁。他于大约1111年与Isabel FitzReginald在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1150年4月3日在英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan Reginald de Dunstanville was born about 1105, in Castle Combe, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reginald Robert de Dunstanville, was 53 and his mother, Adeliza Lisle, was 48. He married Isabel FitzReginald about 1111, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 3 April 1150, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan Reginald de Dunstanville est né environ 1105, à Castle Combe, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald Robert de Dunstanville, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Lisle, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Isabel FitzReginald environ 1111, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 avril 1150, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Of Castle Combe, Wiltshire, England: Castle Combe, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alan Reginald de Dunstanville um 1105 in Castle Combe, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald Robert de Dunstanville 53 und seine Mutter Adeliza Lisle 48. Er hat um 1111 in England, United Kingdom Isabel FitzReginald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. April 1150 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Isabel FitzReginald circa 1111, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 aprile 1150, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan Reginald de Dunstanvilleが約1105年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアカストル コンベで生まれた時，父Reginald Robert de Dunstanvilleは53歳，母Adeliza Lisleは48歳であった。約1111年にイギリスイギリスでIsabel FitzReginaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1150年4月3日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan Reginald de Dunstanville(이)가 대략 1105년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 카스틀 코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald Robert de Dunstanville(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Lisle(은)는 48세였다. 그는 대략 1111년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Isabel FitzReginald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1150년 4월 3일 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Reginald de Dunstanville nasceu aproximadamente 1105, em Castle Combe, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald Robert de Dunstanville, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Lisle, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel FitzReginald aproximadamente 1111, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de abril de 1150, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan Reginald de Dunstanville родился около 1105 г. в местности кастл комб, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reginald Robert de Dunstanville было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Lisle, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel FitzReginald около 1111 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 апреля 1150 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Isabel FitzReginald aproximadamente 1111, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de abril de 1150, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
